site.title: Valeria Jiménez · Designer
site.description: A living archive of professional coherence. Design, product, strategy. 5 years across Bilbao, Berlin, Bogotá and Seoul.

home.chaptersIntro: Each chapter is a phase of my career: a country, a team, a way of working. The five hero projects above belong to these chapters. Click any chapter to see all of the work inside it.

about.signature: I'm Valeria, a designer in motion.
about.ctaTitle: If something here resonated, write me.
about.ctaBody: I'm open to projects, collaborations and conversations.

skills.title: Skills
skills.designBody: I build visual systems that hold up over time, digital products designed to be used, and content that reads as part of something bigger.
designItems: Brand systems · visual identity, brandbooks, scalable systems
Product design · UX/UI for mobile and web, flows, design systems
Visual content · editorial, social media systems, posters, presentations
skills.strategyBody: Before design comes the decision: what to say, to whom, why now. I work that layer first, so the design that follows has something to stand on.
strategyItems: Marketing strategy · tone of voice, communication pillars, content matrices, multichannel campaigns
Business & growth · positioning, value proposition, strategic consulting for early-stage ventures
skills.eventsBody: I design experiences that happen in the world, not on the screen. From 80 people online to 400+ on site, what matters is people leaving with something they didn't have when they arrived.
eventsItems: Event design & execution · concept to D-day, branding, marketing, logistics, speakers, partners
Program design · curriculum, methodology, workshops, coaching and facilitation
skills.softBody: What no class teaches and what holds everything else up.
softItems: Leadership · cross-cultural teams, international project coordination
Communication · bilingual operation between LATAM and Asia, strategic communication across stakeholders, coaching and mentorship
Project & program management · end-to-end ownership, cross-functional coordination, execution under tight timelines
Innovation & entrepreneurship · founder mindset applied to client and internal projects, gap identification, building from zero to launch

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.body: I'm open to opportunities. If something here resonated, or if you're building something where any of this could fit, I'd love to hear about it.
contact.between: Between Seoul and Bogotá. Available across time zones.

footer.title: Living archive
footer.contactCta: Open to opportunities. If something here resonated, write me.
